purpose: Expiry-notification bell slice (inviteExpiries, derived from persisted InviteLink flags), the client-side expiry sweep with a module-level in-flight latch, the fourth NotificationBell render block, and the /groups?manageLinks=1 deep-link that opens the manage-links overlay once the detail view has rendered — plus wiring clearInviteExpiries into the existing group-leave/abandon purge.

public_api.name: initInviteExpiries
public_api.description: Derives, per groupId, the count of that group's stored invite links satisfying isExpired(link, now) && expiryNotified && !expiryAcknowledged. Fully recomputes from persisted flags on every call (AC-NOTIFY-1, AC-INV-2) — never a cached value.

public_api.name: incrementInviteExpiry
public_api.description: Bumps the live inviteExpiries counter for a group by 1. Called only by inviteExpirySweep.ts, after the corresponding IDB stamp has already landed (AC-INV-4).

public_api.name: markInviteExpiriesRead
public_api.description: Persists expiryAcknowledged=true on the group's expired-and-notified links and zeroes that group's live count (AC-NOTIFY-4).

public_api.name: clearInviteExpiries
public_api.description: In-memory removal of a group's inviteExpiries entry, called on group leave/abandon (Design Decision 12, AC-DEEPLINK-4) and on the manageLinks deep-link's group-absent fallback (AC-DEEPLINK-3).

public_api.name: useUnreadCounts
public_api.description: Existing hook, extended: now also returns the inviteExpiries slice and folds it into totalUnread.

public_api.name: runInviteExpirySweep
public_api.description: One expiry-sweep pass: for every locally-stored link that is expired and not yet expiryNotified, stamps expiryNotified=true (IDB write) then calls incrementInviteExpiry — in that order (AC-INV-4). Deduplicated via a module-level in-flight promise latch so concurrent/overlapping calls notify each link at most once (AC-INV-1, AC-NOTIFY-2).

public_api.name: shouldOpenManageLinksOverlay
public_api.signature: (params: { manageLinksParam: string | undefined; groupResolved: boolean; alreadyHandled: boolean }) => boolean
public_api.description: Pure decision extracted from groups.tsx's GroupDetailView: whether the manageLinks=1 deep-link should open the overlay now (AC-DEEPLINK-1/2). Test-only public export — not consumed by another module.

public_api.name: shouldRedirectToGroupsList
public_api.signature: (params: { manageLinksParam: string | undefined; ready: boolean; id: string | undefined; groupIds: string[] }) => boolean
public_api.description: Pure decision extracted from groups.tsx's GroupsPage: whether a manageLinks=1 deep-link targeting an absent groupId should render the groups list instead of the detail view (AC-DEEPLINK-3). Test-only public export.

owned_data: unreadStore.ts in-memory UnreadState.inviteExpiries (per-groupId live counter, derived from inviteLinkStorage's persisted flags — owns no independent persisted state of its own)
dependencies_forbidden: joinFlow (does not reach into approveJoinRequest/joinRequestHandler.ts beyond the pre-existing, unmodified leaveGroup Deps wiring)
